zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Pilkington於1388年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿瑟頓時，她的父親Sir John de Pilkington Snr25歲，母親Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun37歲。她於1399年與Sir William Atherton III在英國藍卡爾布拉可洛德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Pilkington于1388年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿瑟頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Pilkington Snr25岁，母亲Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun37岁。她于1399年与Sir William Atherton III在英国藍卡爾布拉可洛德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Pilkington was born in 1388, in Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, was 25 and her mother, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, was 37. She married Sir William Atherton III in 1399, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1440, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Pilkington est née en 1388, à Atherton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Atherton III en 1399, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Pilkington 1388 in Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Pilkington Snr 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun 37. Sie hat 1399 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England Sir William Atherton III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pilkington è nata il nel 1388 nel Atherton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Atherton III nel 1399, nel Blackrod, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1440, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pilkingtonが1388年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアスエルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Pilkington Snrは25歳，母Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdunは37歳であった。1399年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドでSir William Atherton IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pilkington(이)가 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 앳헤르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Pilkington Snr(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 Sir William Atherton III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pilkington nasceu em 1388, em Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Atherton III em 1399, em Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1440, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Pilkington родилась в 1388 г. в местности атиртон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Pilkington Snr было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Atherton III в 1399 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Pilkington nació en 1388, en Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir William Atherton III en 1399, en Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1440, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
